name: design-craft
description: Turn Claude into an opinionated, accessibility-aware, AI-slop-resistant design collaborator that produces intentional design artifacts in HTML/CSS/SVG/JS — landing pages, interactive prototypes, mobile app screens, slide decks, wireframes, hi-fi variations, design-token extractions, and component inventories. The SKILL.md carries a full design philosophy (content discipline, purposeful aesthetics that reject AI-template tropes, visual hierarchy and rhythm, typography and color systems, interface copy as design material, WCAG accessibility, interaction states, system thinking, respecting the medium) and routes to 24 phased procedures across production (discovery-questions, frontend-aesthetic-direction, wireframe, make-a-deck, make-a-prototype, make-tweakable, generate-variations, make-an-animation, make-a-doc, generate-images), craft (motion-design, gsap-motion, depth-and-3d, laws-of-composition, mobile-design), system (design-system-extract, component-extract, design-system-author), and review (accessibility-audit, ai-slop-check, hierarchy-rhythm-review, interaction-states-pass, visual-verification, polish-pass). Built for Claude Code: AskUserQuestion for kickoff rounds, the Agent tool for parallel verifier fan-out, and self-contained deck-scaling / device-frame / tweak-panel code that runs as standalone files. v1.2 adds mobile-design (iOS/Material platform grammar, thumb zone, input methods, industry conventions, emotional design), gsap-motion (timelines, ScrollTrigger scroll storytelling, SplitText, SVG draw/morph, Flip/Draggable — all plugins free via CDN), visual-verification (viewport-matrix layout integrity + screenshot playbook, a fifth polish-pass reviewer), an interface-copy chapter, subject-derived aesthetics with a plan-time signature element and swap-test genericness gate, and detection for all three current AI-default looks (warm-editorial, dark+acid-accent, broadsheet). v1.3 wires in local design-system libraries (open-design DESIGN.md format: brand systems as binding context, library systems as direction candidates, deck-template styles for deck variety), portable 9-section DESIGN.md emission from design-system-extract/author plus signature-moves capture, accent budgets written as enforceable usage rules, Karpathy-style surgical iteration discipline, and an interface-copy lens in the polish-pass jury.
